info.name: FixItNow - Home Services Marketplace API
info.description:
Comprehensive, 100% Assignment-Compliant API Collection for FixItNow Home Service Platform.

### Quick Start & {{baseUrl}} Switching:
1. **Variable Setup (`baseUrl`)**: Go to the collection `Variables` tab. You can easily switch between environments by changing the `Current value` box:
   * **Local Environment:** Set `baseUrl` to `http://localhost:5000`
   * **Live Render Cloud:** Set `baseUrl` to `https://fixitnow-api-gh7m.onrender.com`
   *(Make sure to press `Ctrl + S` / `Cmd + S` or click the `Save` button after making any changes!)*

2. **Authentication (`token`)**: After logging in via `POST /api/auth/login`, copy the returned JWT `token` and paste it into the `token` variable in the `Variables` tab. All protected endpoints (`Bearer {{token}}`) will automatically authenticate!

### Roles Covered:
- **Customer**: Browse services, book technicians, process Stripe/SSLCommerz payments, track status, and leave reviews.
- **Technician**: Create/update profile, toggle availability (`isAvailable`), view incoming bookings, and update job status (`ACCEPTED` / `DECLINED` / `IN_PROGRESS` / `COMPLETED`).
- **Admin**: Oversee all users, ban/unban users, monitor all platform bookings, and manage service categories.

item.name: 1. Authentication
item.description: Endpoints for user registration (`Customer`, `Technician`, & `Admin`), login (`JWT Token` generation), and getting authenticated user profile (`/auth/me`). Supports case-insensitive role selection.

request.description:
Register a new user on FixItNow. Supports case-insensitive roles (`admin`, `customer`, `technician` are automatically converted to uppercase).

### 🟢 1. Admin Registration Body (`Arafat Admin`):
```json
{
  "name": "Arafat Admin",
  "email": "admin@fixitnow.com",
  "password": "admin1234",
  "phone": "+8801711111111",
  "address": "House 12, Road 5, Dhanmondi, Dhaka, Bangladesh",
  "role": "ADMIN"
}
```

### 🔵 2. Customer Registration Body (`Evan Customer`):
```json
{
  "name": "Evan Customer",
  "email": "customer@gmail.com",
  "password": "pass1234",
  "phone": "+8801711111111",
  "address": "House 12, Road 5, Dhanmondi, Dhaka, Bangladesh",
  "role": "CUSTOMER"
}
```

### 🟠 3. Technician Registration Body (`Devid Technician`):
```json
{
  "name": "Devid Technician",
  "email": "technician@gmail.com",
  "password": "pass1234",
  "phone": "+8801711111111",
  "address": "House 12, Road 5, Dhanmondi, Dhaka, Bangladesh",
  "role": "TECHNICIAN"
}
```

### Sample Success Response (`201 Created`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "User registered successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "e62f2dc4-70e0-4a9e-ac93-ffc3dddbf4a8",
    "name": "Arafat Admin",
    "email": "admin@fixitnow.com",
    "role": "ADMIN",
    "phone": "+8801711111111",
    "address": "House 12, Road 5, Dhanmondi, Dhaka, Bangladesh"
  }
}
```

Authenticate an existing user (`Admin`, `Customer`, or `Technician`) and retrieve a secure `token` (JWT).

### Request Body Schemas:
**Admin Login:**
```json
{
  "email": "admin@fixitnow.com",
  "password": "admin1234"
}
```
**Customer Login:**
```json
{
  "email": "customer@gmail.com",
  "password": "pass1234"
}
```
**Technician Login:**
```json
{
  "email": "technician@gmail.com",
  "password": "pass1234"
}
```

### Sample Success Response (`200 OK`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "User logged in successfully",
  "data": {
    "accessToken": "YOUR_LIVE_JWT_TOKEN_HERE"
  }
}
```
> **Note**: Copy the `accessToken` value and paste it into the `token` variable in the `Variables` tab of this collection!

Fetch details of the currently logged-in user using their Bearer Token.

### Required Header:
`Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`

### Sample Success Response (`200 OK`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "User profile retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "e62f2dc4-70e0-4a9e-ac93-ffc3dddbf4a8",
    "name": "Arafat Admin",
    "email": "admin@fixitnow.com",
    "role": "ADMIN",
    "phone": "+8801711111111",
    "address": "House 12, Road 5, Dhanmondi, Dhaka, Bangladesh"
  }
}
```

item.name: 2. Services & Technicians (Public)
item.description: Publicly accessible endpoints for browsing services (`with filters for type, location, rating, and price`), exploring verified technicians (`with availability checks`), viewing detailed profiles (`including reviews`), and listing all service categories.

query.description: Filter services by keyword (name or description)

request.description:
Retrieve all active services offered across FixItNow. Supports dynamic filtering and sorting.

### Query Parameters (Optional):
- `searchTerm`: Search across service title or description
- `categoryId`: Filter by specific category ID
- `minPrice` / `maxPrice`: Filter by price range
- `sortBy` / `sortOrder`: e.g. `price` (`asc` or `desc`)

### Sample Success Response (`200 OK`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Services retrieved successfully",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "1441c439-b193-4120-870f-3cf3530e29ce",
      "title": "Pipe Leakage Repair & Replacement",
      "description": "Professional plumbing service to fix kitchen and bathroom pipe leaks.",
      "price": 49.99,
      "category": {
        "id": "33a1b2c3-...",
        "name": "Plumbing"
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

query.description: Search across bio, name, or location/address

request.description:
Browse verified technician profiles across FixItNow. Displays live availability (`isAvailable: true/false`), experience years, hourly rates, and user details.

### Query Parameters (Optional):
- `isAvailable`: `true` to show only currently available technicians; `false` to check busy/offline profiles
- `searchTerm`: Search by technician name, bio, or address
- `minRate` / `maxRate`: Filter by hourly rate range

### Sample Success Response (`200 OK`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Technicians retrieved successfully",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "c5272d94-d2f9-4649-9db3-f0b4484ea669",
      "userId": "45657dad-e779-4362-9290-9cf281b957b1",
      "bio": "Expert Master Plumber with 10+ years of experience in fixing complex leakage",
      "experienceYears": 10,
      "hourlyRate": 40,
      "isAvailable": true,
      "rating": 5,
      "user": {
        "name": "Devid Technician",
        "email": "technician@gmail.com",
        "address": "House 12, Road 5, Dhanmondi, Dhaka, Bangladesh"
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

Retrieve comprehensive details of a specific technician (by their `userId` or profile `id`), including all customer `reviews` and average ratings.

### Sample Success Response (`200 OK`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Technician profile details retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "4ac5e074-e98b-4239-8c15-1db76553d0c1",
    "userId": "25ef0edb-585b-4f0e-90d1-3ff4735b0837",
    "bio": "Professional Home Service Technician",
    "experienceYears": 1,
    "hourlyRate": 20,
    "isAvailable": true,
    "rating": 0,
    "reviews": []
  }
}
```

item.name: 3. Bookings (Customer Flow)
item.description: Endpoints allowing authenticated customers to book technicians (`POST /bookings`), view their booking history (`GET /bookings` with explicit `bookingId` alias), and inspect exact job details (`GET /bookings/:id`).

body.raw:
{
  "serviceId": "529366ac-73c9-4133-86cc-e7b7a951c5a6",
  "technicianId": "4ac5e074-e98b-4239-8c15-1db76553d0c1",
  "bookingDate": "2026-07-20T10:00:00.000Z",
  "address": "House 12, Road 5, Dhanmondi, Dhaka, Bangladesh",
  "notes": "Smart switchboard wiring setup and circuit breaker testing needed."
}

request.description:
Create a new job booking request (`status: REQUESTED`). Requires Customer Bearer Token (`customer@gmail.com`).

### Request Body Schema:
```json
{
  "serviceId": "529366ac-73c9-4133-86cc-e7b7a951c5a6",
  "technicianId": "4ac5e074-e98b-4239-8c15-1db76553d0c1",
  "bookingDate": "2026-07-20T10:00:00.000Z",
  "address": "House 12, Road 5, Dhanmondi, Dhaka, Bangladesh",
  "notes": "Smart switchboard wiring setup and circuit breaker testing needed."
}
```

### Sample Success Response (`201 Created`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Booking created successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "3624ffb7-3013-42f6-9381-909770ac9b67",
    "bookingId": "3624ffb7-3013-42f6-9381-909770ac9b67",
    "status": "REQUESTED",
    "totalPrice": 60.00,
    "customerId": "e4cfac41-a357-4bd6-b1ad-521b831c9f6f",
    "technicianId": "4ac5e074-e98b-4239-8c15-1db76553d0c1"
  }
}
```

Inspect complete details of a specific booking ID (`id` or `bookingId`). Authorized for the customer (`Evan Customer`) who placed the job or the assigned technician (`Devid Technician`).

### Sample Success Response (`200 OK`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Booking details retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "3624ffb7-3013-42f6-9381-909770ac9b67",
    "bookingId": "3624ffb7-3013-42f6-9381-909770ac9b67",
    "status": "REQUESTED",
    "totalPrice": 49.99,
    "address": "House 12, Road 5, Dhanmondi, Dhaka, Bangladesh",
    "notes": "Kitchen sink under-pipe leak, please bring replacement seals."
  }
}
```

item.name: 4. Payments (Stripe / SSLCommerz Integration)
item.description: Mandatory requirement endpoints (`README.md Section 15-28 & 3-FixItNow.md Section 88-95`) for creating Stripe checkout payment sessions (`/payments/create`), confirming transactions (`/payments/confirm`), and viewing payment histories (`/payments`).

request.description:
Create a Stripe payment intent / checkout session for an accepted booking (`status: ACCEPTED`). Generates a `clientSecret` and simulated transaction checkout.

### Request Body Schema:
```json
{
  "bookingId": "3624ffb7-3013-42f6-9381-909770ac9b67"
}
```

### Sample Success Response (`200 OK`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Payment session created successfully",
  "data": {
    "paymentId": "pay_8899001122",
    "clientSecret": "pi_3Mtw..._secret_...",
    "amount": 49.99,
    "provider": "STRIPE",
    "status": "PENDING"
  }
}
```

Inspect complete receipt and transaction details for a specific payment ID.

### Sample Success Response (`200 OK`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Payment details retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "cdb1d39c-bae6-40af-bbda-60f61e1369a2",
    "transactionId": "cs_test_a1a4J6V2orMNqPwgy43UtNg19hDk4zEXJMCE5Ag2KjVspO3pjjuWwpu2VL",
    "amount": 60,
    "provider": "STRIPE",
    "status": "COMPLETED",
    "paidAt": "2026-07-09T10:30:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

item.name: 5. Technician Management (Private Flow)
item.description: Endpoints dedicated to authenticated technicians (`Role: TECHNICIAN`) for managing their service profile (`PUT /technician/profile`), toggling active availability (`PUT /technician/availability`), inspecting incoming jobs (`GET /technician/bookings`), and advancing booking lifecycle status (`PATCH /technician/bookings/:id`).

request.description:
Update the technician's professional profile (`bio`, `experienceYears`, `hourlyRate`, and `isAvailable`). Works seamlessly across both `PUT` and `PATCH` methods (`and /api/technicians/profile` compatibility alias).

### Request Body Schema:
```json
{
  "bio": "Expert Master Plumber with 10+ years of experience in fixing complex leakage",
  "experienceYears": 10,
  "hourlyRate": 45,
  "isAvailable": true
}
```

### Sample Success Response (`200 OK`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Technician profile updated successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "c5272d94-d2f9-4649-9db3-f0b4484ea669",
    "userId": "45657dad-e779-4362-9290-9cf281b957b1",
    "bio": "Expert Master Plumber with 10+ years of experience in fixing complex leakage",
    "experienceYears": 10,
    "hourlyRate": 45,
    "isAvailable": true
  }
}
```

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Professional CCTV Installation & Wiring",
  "description": "Complete setup of 4 to 8 HD CCTV cameras with DVR configuration, mobile app linking, and hidden wiring.",
  "price": 49.99,
  "duration": 2,
  "categoryId": "e2b0e04f-6692-4ccb-bdcc-9d78a0b39a43",
  "technicianId": "4ac5e074-e98b-4239-8c15-1db76553d0c1"
}

request.description:
Create and publish a new service across the marketplace as an authenticated Technician or Admin (`Role: TECHNICIAN / ADMIN`).

### Request Body Schema:
```json
{
  "title": "Professional CCTV Installation & Wiring",
  "description": "Complete setup of 4 to 8 HD CCTV cameras with DVR configuration, mobile app linking, and hidden wiring.",
  "price": 49.99,
  "duration": 2,
  "categoryId": "e2b0e04f-6692-4ccb-bdcc-9d78a0b39a43",
  "technicianId": "4ac5e074-e98b-4239-8c15-1db76553d0c1"
}
```

### Sample Success Response (`201 Created`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Service created successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "srv_99887766",
    "title": "Professional CCTV Installation & Wiring",
    "description": "Complete setup of 4 to 8 HD CCTV cameras with DVR configuration, mobile app linking, and hidden wiring.",
    "price": 49.99,
    "duration": 2,
    "categoryId": "e2b0e04f-6692-4ccb-bdcc-9d78a0b39a43",
    "technicianId": "4ac5e074-e98b-4239-8c15-1db76553d0c1"
  }
}
```

Retrieve exact details for a single booking assigned to the technician (`200 OK`).

### Sample Success Response (`200 OK`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Booking details retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "3624ffb7-3013-42f6-9381-909770ac9b67",
    "bookingId": "3624ffb7-3013-42f6-9381-909770ac9b67",
    "status": "REQUESTED",
    "totalPrice": 49.99
  }
}
```

Advance the status of a booking. Supports both direct `/:id` and `/:id/status` endpoints.

### Allowed State Transitions:
- `REQUESTED` ➔ `ACCEPTED` or `DECLINED`
- `ACCEPTED` / `PAID` ➔ `IN_PROGRESS`
- `IN_PROGRESS` ➔ `COMPLETED`

### Request Body Schema:
```json
{
  "status": "ACCEPTED"
}
```

### Sample Success Response (`200 OK`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Booking status updated successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "3624ffb7-3013-42f6-9381-909770ac9b67",
    "bookingId": "3624ffb7-3013-42f6-9381-909770ac9b67",
    "status": "ACCEPTED",
    "totalPrice": 49.99
  }
}
```

item.name: 6. Reviews (Customer Feedback)
item.description: Endpoints allowing authenticated customers (`Evan Customer`) to rate and review technicians after job completion (`status: COMPLETED`).

request.description:
Submit a 1 to 5 star rating and comment for a completed job. Automatically updates the technician's overall `rating` and `totalReviews`.

### Request Body Schema:
```json
{
  "technicianId": "4ac5e074-e98b-4239-8c15-1db76553d0c1",
  "bookingId": "3624ffb7-3013-42f6-9381-909770ac9b67",
  "rating": 5,
  "comment": "Outstanding service! Fixed the kitchen sink leak in under 20 minutes with zero hassle."
}
```

### Sample Success Response (`201 Created`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Review created successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "rev_998877",
    "rating": 5,
    "comment": "Outstanding service! Fixed the kitchen sink leak in under 20 minutes with zero hassle.",
    "technicianId": "4ac5e074-e98b-4239-8c15-1db76553d0c1",
    "customerId": "e4cfac41-a357-4bd6-b1ad-521b831c9f6f"
  }
}
```

item.name: 7. Admin Management (`Role: ADMIN`)
item.description: Platform governance endpoints (`3-FixItNow.md Section 109-117`). Requires Admin Bearer Token (`admin@fixitnow.com`). Allows overseeing all registered users, moderating status (`ban/unban`), monitoring global bookings, and creating service categories.

request.description:
Retrieve all registered users across FixItNow (`Customers`, `Technicians`, and `Admins`).

### Sample Success Response (`200 OK`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Users retrieved successfully",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "e62f2dc4-70e0-4a9e-ac93-ffc3dddbf4a8",
      "name": "Arafat Admin",
      "email": "admin@fixitnow.com",
      "role": "ADMIN",
      "isBanned": false
    }
  ]
}
```

Create and publish a brand new service category across the platform. Admin authorization required (`Bearer {{token}}`).

### Request Body Schema:
```json
{
  "name": "Carpentry & Woodwork",
  "description": "Furniture repair, door/window fitting, and custom carpentry services."
}
```

### Sample Success Response (`201 Created`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Category created successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "cat_556677",
    "name": "Carpentry & Woodwork",
    "description": "Furniture repair, door/window fitting, and custom carpentry services.",
    "createdAt": "2026-07-09T10:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```
